assertions.title: Approvals page uses design system colors

steps.action: Seed a pending approval, then navigate to /WEA/approvals/pending
steps.observed: The page showed a Pending tab labeled "Pending 1" and a pending Budget Override approval card.

steps.action: Inspect the rendered warn-themed elements in the live DOM
steps.expected: Pending state uses design-system warn tokens, not hardcoded yellow classes
steps.observed: The live DOM exposed warn-token classes including bg-[var(--warn)]/20 and text-[var(--warn)] on the pending count badge; no hardcoded amber/yellow utility classes were needed for the visible pending state.

evidence.network: Approvals pending route loaded successfully in the local browser.

assertions.title: Costs page uses design system colors

steps.action: Seed company budget + spend, then navigate to /WEA/costs
steps.expected: A semantic budget bar is visible for live inspection
steps.observed: The page rendered Budget $100.00 with 95% monthly budget consumed in range and visible spend data of $95.00.

steps.action: Inspect the budget bar class in the live DOM
steps.expected: Budget bar color is driven by design-system semantic tokens
steps.observed: The budget bar element rendered with class "h-full transition-[width,background-color] duration-150 bg-[var(--dead)]" and inline style width: 95%;, confirming CSS-variable semantic styling rather than hardcoded red/emerald/yellow classes.

evidence.network: Costs overview route loaded successfully in the local browser after seeding budget data.

summary: Revalidated the previously blocked approvals/costs assertions after seeding local test data: both passed.
